_template: TEMPLATE - values frozen at calibration; placeholders below. This file is a Stage 10 artifact (see docs/master_plan.md). Style windows and skin-locus thresholds are frozen on dev_human_calibration BEFORE final eval. Until then treat nothing here as authoritative: 'frozen' fields are null and version keys are TODO. 'provisional' fields mirror the not-yet-frozen tables in docs/detailed_behavior_spec.md ('Supported Style Bundles', 'Skin-Locus Safety', 'Human Calibration'). Do NOT invent frozen numbers.

style_windows._note: One window per supported style bundle. 'provisional' mirrors docs/detailed_behavior_spec.md 'Supported Style Bundles' (not yet frozen). 'frozen' is filled at calibration.

matte.provisional: black point L* +2..+8, contrast spread -1..-7, chroma -1..-5, no strong split tone

faded.provisional: black point L* +2..+10, chroma -4..-12, highlight L* -1..-7, contrast -2..-10

filmic.provisional: highlight L* -2..-8, chroma -1..-6, contrast -2..+4, weak/no split tone

cinematic.provisional: teal/cyan shadows plus orange/yellow highlights, split strength 2..8, chroma -1..-6

teal-orange.provisional: teal/cyan shadows plus orange/yellow highlights, split strength 5..14, neutral DeltaE00 <= 2

sepia.provisional: global b* +2..+12, global a* +0.5..+6, chroma -1..-8, no teal shadows

natural.provisional: small deltas only, neutral drift improved or <= 1.5, must not match another style

skin_locus_thresholds._note: Fixed skin_locus_v1 chart gate. 'provisional' mirrors docs/detailed_behavior_spec.md 'Skin-Locus Safety'. 'frozen' is filled at calibration.

calibration_gates._note: Provisional acceptance for the calibration itself; see docs/detailed_behavior_spec.md 'Human Calibration'. These gate whether the freeze is accepted, not model output.
